name: @parel/sandbox-cloudflare
description: Provides the standard parel.sandbox capability backed by Cloudflare Sandbox.

config.namespace: Required host-injected Cloudflare Durable Object namespace.
config.sandboxId: Optional Durable Object id. Defaults to parel-default.
config.destroyOnSessionEnd: Defaults to false because the Durable Object is host-managed.
